prompt: I've been pretty active in crypto this year. I swapped ETH for various DeFi tokens maybe 40-50 times, earned about £1,200 in staking rewards from Ethereum, provided liquidity on Uniswap and got about £800 in fees, sold some NFTs at a loss, and cashed out about £12,000 of bitcoin to GBP. I haven't kept great records tbh. What am I looking at tax-wise and how do I even calculate all this for my self assessment?

assertions.text: Explains that every token-to-token swap is a taxable disposal for CGT
States staking rewards are subject to income tax (not CGT)
Addresses LP fees/rewards as income tax
Explains NFT losses can offset other crypto capital gains
Mentions share pooling rules (same-day, 30-day bed and breakfast, S104 pool)
Mentions the mid-year CGT rate change on 30 October 2024
Mentions SA108 or supplementary pages for reporting CGT
Provides strong warning or guidance about record-keeping and reconstruction
